business.name: Beale's Cleaning and Handyman Services LLC
business.tagline: Fix it. Clean it. Done right.

hero.headline: The *fix-it crew* Virginia Beach calls first
hero.subheadline: From leaky faucets to deep cleans — we handle what others won't touch. Licensed, reliable, and already in your neighborhood.

services_section.label: WHAT WE HANDLE
services_section.heading: Everything that breaks, leaks, or needs attention
services_section.subheading: We're the crew that shows up with the right tools and gets it done the first time

services.title: Home Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: Drywall patches, door adjustments, cabinet fixes, and all those little things that drive you crazy. We tackle the honey-do list so you don't have to.

services.title: Deep Cleaning Services
services.description: Move-out cleans, post-construction cleanup, and the kind of thorough scrub that makes your place feel new again. We bring the elbow grease.

services.title: Plumbing Fixes
services.description: Leaky faucets, running toilets, clogged drains, and water pressure issues. Quick fixes that save you from calling the expensive guys.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: Outlet repairs, fixture replacements, and basic wiring fixes. Safe, code-compliant work that keeps your lights on.

services.title: Painting & Touch-ups
services.description: Interior walls, trim work, and those scuff marks that make everything look worn. Fresh paint that transforms your space.

about.heading: Built for Virginia Beach homes and businesses
about.body: We're the local crew that handles what others consider too small or too messy. From quick fixes to full cleanouts, we've built our reputation on showing up when we say we will and finishing what we start. Whether it's a rental turnover or your forever home, we treat every job like it's our own place.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Virginia Beach neighbors are saying

reviews.name: Harold W.
reviews.text: Got my whole backyard project done - fence, furniture setup, gazebo installation. Left them to work, came back to a superb job. True professionals who get it done right.

reviews.name: Jasmine B.
reviews.text: Amazing attention to detail and very professional. Hard worker who comes to get the job done. If you need quality work, this is who you call.

reviews.name: Coach T.
reviews.text: This company easily outperforms the bigger brand names. Outstanding work at reasonable prices - you can take that to the bank.

reviews.name: Keshana
reviews.text: Great work and very professional service. Highly recommend and will definitely use them again for future projects.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving the Hampton Roads area
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to cross things off your list?
cta.body: Free estimates on all handyman and cleaning services. Call now and we'll talk through your project - no obligation, just honest advice.
